description: Model-specific repair rules for DeepSeek family models (V4 Pro, V4 Flash, V3, R1). These are additive to the universal repairs (null-strip, object-unwrap, JSON-array-parse) already applied by the plugin.

repairs._comment: DeepSeek Flash often sends 'dir' or 'directory' when tools expect 'workdir'
DeepSeek V4 Pro often sends string numbers for tool params like timeout, limit, offset
